ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "ranking" TEXT /* Ranking of the team at the time of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the game */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year when the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the team plays their home games */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the player has */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being analyzed */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being analyzed */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score assigned to the player for the game */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the player’s performance */,
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific statistics for the game */,
  "goal_contributions" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored or assisted by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes made by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_stats_id FOREIGN KEY ("stats_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stats_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the coach has */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Description of the coach's coaching style */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface in the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the game */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the game */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of possession by the team */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the team */,
  "offside" INTEGER /* Number of offside calls against the team */,
  "fouls_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of fouls conceded by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
